name: claude-code-setup-optimizer
description: Optimiza tu forma de trabajar con Claude Code: metodología (Forja, design-review, caveman, grill, handoff) + automatizaciones (hooks, subagents, /release, plantillas de permisos) + la skill optimize-my-setup que recomienda y deja al usuario elegir qué aplicar. Fuente única, instalable en cualquier repo.

plugins.name: forge-methodology
plugins.description: Human↔AI methodology: align intent → versioned spec → adversarial grill ×3 → global plan → optimised execution → verify vs DoD → owner sign-off. Domain-agnostic.

plugins.name: design-review
plugins.description: Integral design/redesign/audit: visual hierarchy, IA, cognitive load, accessibility, tokens, motion.

plugins.name: working-methods
plugins.description: Cross-project working norms: caveman low-cost comms + /grill (adversarial ×3) + /handoff (session relay). Model routing and orchestration baked into the commands.

plugins.name: automations
plugins.description: Automatizaciones de proceso: hook guard-append-only (protege migraciones/auditoría commiteadas), subagents (messagebus-reviewer, i18n-reviewer), /release, plantillas de permisos/CLAUDE.md y la skill optimize-my-setup (recomienda y el usuario elige qué aplicar). Language-agnostic.
